summary: Crystal‑clear audience/matrix recording captures a flawless 9/21/82 Garden show with Jerry’s blazing guitar and standout performances of Crazy Fingers, Big River and High Time.
review: Both reviewers rave about the show’s consistent energy from start to finish, highlighting Jerry Garcia’s inventive guitar work and several superb renditions – especially “Crazy Fingers,” “Big River” and “High Time.” The audience recording is praised as matrix‑quality: clean, clear, with no boominess or echo and vocals that cut through like a soundboard. Overall it’s an almost perfect performance captured in excellent audio.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviews are five‑star, praising both the musical execution and the high‑fidelity audience/matrix recording; weighted average yields a near‑perfect score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean and clear sound with no boominess or echo; audience ambience fades when music starts, vocals crisp as on any SBD or matrix.

standout_songs: Beat it On Down The Line
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the concert as stellar from start to finish with no low point, indicating a tight, high‑energy flow throughout both sets.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar blazing with inventive and unexpected lines throughout the entire show.
